                Job Post Details

                Software Tester Intern (Damietta) - job post

                Appgain.co
                Damietta

                Job details

                Job type

                • Internship
                &nbsp;

                Location

                Damietta
                &nbsp;

                Full job description

                We are looking for a highly observant and curious Software Tester Intern to join our Quality Assurance team. In this role, you will help ensure that our software products are bug-free, reliable, and user-friendly. You will work closely with developers and product managers to execute test cases, report defects, and learn the ins and outs of the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC).
                Key Responsibilities:

                • Test Case Development & Execution:
                • Assist in creating and executing manual test cases based on requirements.
                • Learn to identify and document software defects.
                • Bug Tracking & Reporting:
                • Log and track issues using tools like JIRA, Trello
                • Collaborate with developers to verify fixes.
                • Functional & Regression Testing:
                • Perform basic functional, UI, and regression testing.
                • Help ensure software meets design specifications.
                • Introduction to Test Automation
                • Gain exposure to automation tools like Selenium, Postman
                • Assist in maintaining automated test scripts.
                • Documentation & Learning:
                • Document test results and assist in generating test reports.
                • Learn Agile/Scrum methodologies and QA best practices.

                Qualifications:

                • Education: Pursuing a degree in Computer Science, IT, Engineering, or related field.
                • Technical Skills:
                • Basic understanding of software testing concepts (manual testing preferred).
                • Familiarity with SDLC and bug-tracking tools
                • Exposure to SQL, APIs, or test automation

                Job Type: Internship - paid

                Location : on site - domyat only

                Education:

                • Bachelor's (Preferred)

                Experience:

                • manual testing: 1 year (Preferred)
                • Mobile Testing: 1 year (Preferred)

                Location:

                • Damietta (Required)

                Work Location: In person
